friendly_name: Migrate Controllers to Explicit Route Attributes
source_description: Migrate 346 unannotated array $params/$query parameters across 173 methods in 37 src/Controller/*.php files to explicit Waaseyaa\SSR\Attribute\MapRoute / MapQuery attributes. Closes waaseyaa/minoo#753 (v0.14 milestone). Follow-up to alpha.173 dispatcher implicit-array compatibility shim (framework#1390).
